+ /// Calculate survival faith (work) based on minutes worked.
+ /// Tiers (integer minutes):
+ ///   0 – 119 min  → 0
+-/// 120 – 239 min  → 10
+-/// 240 – 359 min  → 20
+-/// 360 – 479 min  → 30
+-/// 480+           → 40
++/// 120 – 239 min  → 100
++/// 240 – 359 min  → 200
++/// 360 – 479 min  → 300
++/// 480+           → 400
+ pub fn calc_survival(minutes: i32) -> i32 {
+     if minutes < 120 {
+         0
+     } else if minutes < 240 {
+-        10
++        100
+     } else if minutes < 360 {
+-        20
